question: Comment gerer les preoccupations transversales sur les entites JPA ?

principles.text: JPA @EntityListeners pour lifecycle entite (audit, sanitization). Spring AOP pour service/controller. Servlet Filter pour HTTP. Jamais traitement manuel dans services.

sources.name: JPA 3.2 Specification Entity Listeners
sources.quote: Entity listeners receive lifecycle callback events and can be shared across entities

sources.name: Hibernate ORM 7 Events
sources.quote: Event system provides hooks for pre/post insert, update, delete operations

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Software Design cross-cutting
sources.quote: Cross-cutting concerns should be modularized to avoid scattering and tangling

java-spring-boot.text: JPA @EntityListeners pour lifecycle entite. NestJS utilise interceptors/guards. Django utilise signals/middleware.
